Survey bootstrap variance estimators

Source: R/surveybootstrap_package.r
surveybootstrap.Rd

surveybootstrap has methods for analyzing data that were collected using network reporting techniques. It includes estimators appropriate for the simple bootstrap and the rescaled bootstrap.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://dfeehan.github.io/surveybootstrap/

  • https://github.com/dfeehan/surveybootstrap

  • http://dennisfeehan.org/surveybootstrap/

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/dfeehan/surveybootstrap/issues
